elements.name: slide-title
elements.text: The asteroid belt is not a wall
elements.textPreview: The asteroid belt is not a wall

lines.text: The asteroid belt is not a wall

paragraphs.text: The asteroid belt is not a wall

runs.text: The asteroid belt is not a wall

elements.name: slide-subtitle
elements.text: Between Mars and Jupiter is a wide region of leftover building blocks, with plenty of empty space.
elements.textPreview: Between Mars and Jupiter is a wide region of leftover building blocks, with plenty of empty space.

lines.text: Between Mars and Jupiter is a wide region of leftover building blocks, with plenty of empty space.

paragraphs.text: Between Mars and Jupiter is a wide region of leftover building blocks, with plenty of empty space.

runs.text: Between Mars and Jupiter is a wide region of leftover building blocks, with plenty of empty space.

elements.name: callout-body-Ceres is the largest object
elements.text: It is massive enough to be rounded by gravity, so it is classified as a dwarf planet.
elements.textPreview: It is massive enough to be rounded by gravity, so it is classified as a dwarf planet.

lines.text: It is massive enough to be rounded by gravity, so it is classified as a dwarf planet.

paragraphs.text: It is massive enough to be rounded by gravity, so it is classified as a dwarf planet.

runs.text: It is massive enough to be rounded by gravity, so it is classified as a dwarf planet.

elements.name: callout-body-Jupiter acts like a sculptor
elements.text: Its gravity stirred the region and helped prevent a full planet from forming there.
elements.textPreview: Its gravity stirred the region and helped prevent a full planet from forming there.

lines.text: Its gravity stirred the region and helped prevent a full planet from forming there.

paragraphs.text: Its gravity stirred the region and helped prevent a full planet from forming there.

runs.text: Its gravity stirred the region and helped prevent a full planet from forming there.
